description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a fenced yard and featuring a spacious driveway leading to a garage. The front garden is landscaped with green hedges and several ornamental trees, while the backyard includes a paved area with a gazebo and a hot tub. The building itself is primarily rectangular, with large windows and a mix of white and dark gray exterior walls. The property includes multiple entry points, visible doors, and a car parked in the driveway. The layout suggests an open-plan interior with several rooms, and the outdoor spaces are designed for both relaxation and utility. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor amenities, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with landscaped gardens, a large driveway, garage, and outdoor amenities like a gazebo and hot tub. The exterior features white and dark gray walls, large windows, and a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden with hedges and trees, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white and gray exterior, visible windows, and the backyard with a hot tub and gazebo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large paved area, parked car, backyard amenities, and the full extent of the fenced property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional entry points, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
